message:
docs(perf): drop redundant CARGO_TARGET_DIR from warm-profile reproduction

The repro command for the archive_batch_100 profile used to set
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target explicitly inside `rch exec --
env ...`. That env var is already exported from ~/.zshrc (and
~/.bashrc) on the VPS as of the 2026-04-21 btrfs page-cache / fsfs
orphan remediation, so the inline assignment is noise.

Keeping it in the flamegraph line because `cargo flamegraph` runs
outside `rch` here and still benefits from the explicit override for
readers copy-pasting on machines without a shell-level export.

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Archive Batch 100 Profile
 
 ## Reproduction
-- warm profile: `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target MCP_AGENT_MAIL_ARCHIVE_PROFILE=1 cargo bench -p mcp-agent-mail --bench benchmarks -- archive_write_batch`
+- warm profile: `rch exec -- env MCP_AGENT_MAIL_ARCHIVE_PROFILE=1 cargo bench -p mcp-agent-mail --bench benchmarks -- archive_write_batch`
 - flamegraph: `env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target cargo flamegraph -p mcp-agent-mail --bench benchmarks --root -- archive_write_batch`
 - dry-run validated: yes
 - cross-engineer target: Reproduce within 10% on similar CPU/storage/filesystem/kernel hardware within 30 days
